steps.title: Notice the shortcut
steps.content: The problem asks for $2(x-7)$, not for $x$. That expression already appears in the equation, so isolate it directly.

steps.title: Avoid extra work
steps.content: There is no need to divide by $2$ or solve for $x$ because the target value is already $2(x-7)$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $2(x-7)=36$, which matches Choice C — $36$. Therefore C is correct.
